channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: OpenAI plants its first overseas applied-AI lab in Singapore, with a $235M commitment
item.description: The company will scale to about 200 staff in the city-state and align the lab’s work to Singapore’s public-sector, finance, healthcare, and digital-infrastructure priorities. OpenAI said on Wednesday it will open its first applied-AI lab outside the United St… [OpenAI]

item.title: How the multibillion dollar AI data center boom has transformed CBRE, the world’s largest commercial real estate company
